---
title: "OECD workshop on R"
description: "R4DEV workshop from my internship at OECD"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date: 03-14-2024
categories: [R, course] 

draft: true
---

This is the results of an OECD workshop on R called [**R4DEV**](https://r4dev.netlify.app/) created and taught by Nelson Amaya. It took place from March to June 2024. During this workshop, I learned how to use R for text analysis, data visualisation: (plots, animated graphs and maps), web scrapping, shiny apps and quarto publishing.

Find my achievements below.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
